description: Sets up email authentication records so Forgigs can send emails on your behalf (newsletters, order confirmations). Creates SPF and DKIM records required to verify your domain with email providers.
variableDescription: %spf_value%: Email authentication value provided by Forgigs; %dkim1_host% / %dkim1_value%: Email signing key 1; %dkim2_host% / %dkim2_value%: Email signing key 2; %dkim3_host% / %dkim3_value%: Email signing key 3 (if applicable)
